goal: Найти и валидировать новые cross-symbol directional features и CatBoost long/short классификаторы, сравнить их с immutable baseline active-signal-v1@1 через matched OOS.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 — immutable reference; never modify base, its thresholds, hours, days, execution, or feature set
No feature/target/threshold/architecture selection based on lockbox window — lockbox only validates frozen choices
All improvements must pass matched OOS comparison with base on the same window
Classification only — no regression on raw future PnL
Separate long and short classifiers first; no multiclass or router model at start (router only if both M1 and M2 show meaningful OOS value)
Maximum 3-4 strong feature families; no wide feature inflation
Compact disciplined HPO grid only: depth {4,6,8}, lr {0.03,0.05}, moderate regularization, 2-3 seeds max
Allowed horizons: 12h, 18h only; allowed barrier schemes: balanced, conservative only
Purge gap between train and later windows: minimum 24h
Thresholds must be frozen on selection OOS before lockbox is opened
Train/selection/lockbox windows must be frozen before any model training begins

slices.title: Dataset contract and label design without leakage
slices.hypothesis: Freeze train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS windows and define barrier-based long/short labels before any model training.
slices.objective: Freeze train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS windows and define barrier-based long/short labels before any model training.
success_criteria: Dataset splits and labels completely frozen and documented
evidence_requirements: Dataset splits and labels completely frozen and documented

slices.title: Fast plausibility check of feature packs
slices.hypothesis: Filter out unpromising feature packs with lightweight models before full training; keep max 2 pack setups per side.
slices.objective: Filter out unpromising feature packs with lightweight models before full training; keep max 2 pack setups per side.
success_criteria: Shortlist of max 4 setups (2 long + 2 short) promoted to full training
evidence_requirements: Shortlist of max 4 setups (2 long + 2 short) promoted to full training

slices.title: Train CatBoost long/short classifiers
slices.hypothesis: Train disciplined candidate CatBoost classification models on the shortlisted setups with frozen hyperparameter grid.
slices.objective: Train disciplined candidate CatBoost classification models on the shortlisted setups with frozen hyperparameter grid.
success_criteria: Frozen long and short model candidates with documented model cards ready for sleeve construction
evidence_requirements: Frozen long and short model candidates with documented model cards ready for sleeve construction
